instructions:
The compacted database is ready. To complete the swap safely:
1. Close foobar2000 entirely.
2. Rename or move original: C:\Users\dissonance\AppData\Roaming\foobar2000-v2\metadb.sqlite
3. Rename compacted to original name: C:\Users\dissonance\AppData\Roaming\foobar2000-v2\metadb_compacted.sqlite -> metadb.sqlite
4. Restart foobar2000 and verify functionality.
